name: opencode-queue
description: OpenCode plugin that maintains a global task queue and processes queued work when OpenCode is idle.

scripts.build:runtime: npm run build && mkdir -p "$HOME/.config/opencode/plugins" "$HOME/.config/opencode/plugin/opencode-queue" && cp dist/opencode-queue.js "$HOME/.config/opencode/plugin/opencode-queue/index.js" && printf 'export { default } from "../plugin/opencode-queue/index.js"\n' > "$HOME/.config/opencode/plugins/opencode-queue.js" && rm -f "$HOME/.config/opencode/plugins/executive-assistant.js" "$HOME/.config/opencode/plugins/executive-assistant.impl.js" && rm -rf "$HOME/.config/opencode/plugin/executive-assistant"
